name: Secret / Password (NER)
description: Detects passwords, API keys, tokens, and other secrets via an active NER provider (OPF's SECRET label). On the ai4privacy benchmark OPF's SECRET detector hits F1 0.97 — much better than any single regex because it covers prose, JSON, HTML, YAML lists, and positional-schema passwords. This rule exposes that capability. The regex-based credentials.password_context / credentials.password_context_json sibling rules remain as precision-oriented fallbacks when no NER provider is available. Rule silently no-ops when no NER provider is active.

effect.message: Secret detected by NER redacted for de-identification
